mapper.select: /* AppLisk01Mapper."selectRiskCategory" */ SELECT BAIM_VAL_D_CD , BAIM_VAL_D_NM , SORT_IDX FROM TB_BAIM_VAL_D WHERE 1=1 AND CMPNY_CD = #{token.gv_cmpnyCd} AND BAIM_VAL_CD = 'COM002' AND USE_YN = 'Y'

/* AppChkLst01Mapper."selectChkLstInfo" */ SELECT A.CMPNY_CD AS cmpnyCd , A.CHKLST_TYPE AS chklstType , A.CHKPT_DESC AS chkptDesc , B.INSPECT_ITEM_CD AS inspectItemCd , B.INSPECT_ITEM_SUBJ AS inspectItemSubj , 'Y' AS inspectValue , B.SORT_IDX AS sortIdx FROM TB_CHKPT_TYPE_MGMT A INNER JOIN TB_CHKPT_INSPECT_ITEM B ON ( A.CMPNY_CD = B.CMPNY_CD AND A.CHKLST_TYPE = B.CHKLST_TYPE AND A.USE_YN = B.USE_YN ) WHERE 1=1 AND A.CMPNY_CD = #{ token.gv_cmpnyCd } AND A.SITE_CD = #{ param.siteCd } AND A.CHKPT_CD = #{ param.chkptCd } AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY B.SORT_IDX
